examples: Miniature Yorkshire puddings with a morsel of beef and horseradish make a great canapé.
Wasabe (hot, green Japanese horseradish) can be added to make it spicier.
Their first product was grated horseradish, bottled in a clear glass to showcase its purity.
Just before serving, the salad gets tossed in a vinaigrette made with a small amount of horseradish.
